_comment: Pass 2 Task 2 — frozen AIModel UUID5 literals. These four tier-1 (Docker-ships) AIModel rows were previously regenerated by hypothalamus/parsing_tools/ollama_fixture_generator.py via uuid5(NAMESPACE_DNS, f'areself.ollama.{slug}'). They are now pinned here as boot-minimum content. The generator stays for now as the Task-5 escape hatch and is no longer the source of truth. nomic-embed-text is hard-required by hippocampus/models.py:87 (OllamaClient('nomic-embed-text')); the other three are the minimum chat/coder/multimodal trio shipped with Docker. Until Task 5 wires zygote.json into are-self-install.bat and removes the duplicate rows from hypothalamus/fixtures/initial_data.json, this file is a dormant freeze artifact — do not loaddata it standalone or you will collide on PK with initial_data.json.
